summary: Added activate_global_tab() function to WezTerm config and updated keybindings 1-9 to use it. Ctrl+Space + number now navigates to tabs by their global position across all windows, not just within the current window.

artifacts.summary: Added activate_global_tab() function and updated keybindings for cross-window tab navigation

completion_data.completion_summary: Implemented cross-window global tab navigation in WezTerm by adding activate_global_tab() function that uses MuxTab:activate() and GuiWindow:focus() to navigate to tabs by their global position across all windows, matching the existing tab bar numbering.

next_steps: Test cross-window tab navigation by opening multiple WezTerm windows with multiple tabs and pressing Ctrl+Space + number to verify navigation works across windows
